name: chain_gov_contract_bja_peer_review_support_s
method: [GOV CONTRACT] BJA PEER REVIEW SUPPORT SERVICES (deadline: 2026-04-17)

stages.task: pull SAM.gov daily feed via public API + Playwright fallback, filter to peer-review/support-services solicitations, output raw opportunity list
score each contract 1-10 on value/timeline/eligibility, apply NAICS filter, flag set-asides and past-performance waivers
for score >= 6: claude -p generates capability statement stub + proposal outline + price-to-win range using market comps from USASpending.gov
monitor deadline countdown, inject 7-day and 3-day warnings into OPS/HEARTBEAT.md and SESSION_BRIEFING.md
